candidate_check.description: Kubernetes etcd must have a certificate for communication.

check_content_excerpt:
Change to the /etc/kubernetes/manifests directory on the Kubernetes Control Plane. Run the command:
grep -i cert-file * 

If the setting "cert-file" is not configured in the Kubernetes etcd manifest file, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
Edit the Kubernetes etcd manifest file in the /etc/kubernetes/manifests directory on the Kubernetes Control Plane. 

Set the value of "--cert-file" to the Approved Organizational Certificate.
title: Kubernetes etcd must have a certificate for communication.
